Structure.DataValueMember: 'Waiting for Parts to Start Next battery or Signoff Complete of Current Battery'
'Signoff Failed, Trace Data not Sent to MES'
'Move to Anode Approach and Check Vacuum'
'Clear Anodes: Pick Top Anode with Vacuum'
'Clear Anodes: Move to Top Anode Approach'
'Clear Anodes: Pick Middle Anode with Vacuum'
'Clear Anodes: Move to Middle Anode Approach'
'Clear Anodes: Pick Bottom Anode with Vacuum'
'Clear Anodes: Move to Bottom Anode Approach'
'Wait for Transfer Gripper and Check Vacuum'
'Check Insulator Platform Vacuum Wait for Can Read Complete'
'Vacuum Check that Can Place was Successful'
'Pick Completed Can When Ready. Work on Second Can if Appropriate.$t'
'Handoff to Robot from Can Insert Station'
'Move to Safe with Can, wait for PIA signoff'
